step_rationale: NF-κB signaling kinase amplifies inflammatory responses and macrophage activation in atherosclerotic lesions.
mechanism: IKK-mediated NF-κB activation drives pro-inflammatory cytokine production and macrophage recruitment within destabilizing plaques.

references.title: Histone Deacetylase 9 Activates IKK to Regulate Atherosclerotic Plaque Vulnerability.
